description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after the character Dragonite from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features a rounded, orange body with a cream-colored segmented belly and two small, teal-colored wings with yellow edges on its back. Its head is adorned with two white, curved antennae and large, expressive black eyes, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The arms are short and outstretched, while the legs are thick and end in three white claws each. The tail is long and tapers to a point, extending behind the body. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, and the overall construction suggests it is filled with a lightweight, compressible material.
description: A soft, orange Dragonite plush toy with teal wings, a cream belly, and a friendly face. It has outstretched arms, a long tail, and a cuddly, rounded body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, cream belly, outstretched arms, and both wings clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, one wing, the curve of the tail, and the segmentation of the belly.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both wings, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, one wing, and the tail's extension.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with large, wide-open black eyes and a small, subtle smile. The absence of eyebrows or exaggerated features gives it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides, legs slightly apart, and head facing forward. The tail extends straight back behind the body.
